testCases.name: Should count the elements in a list of numbers
Should return 1 for a single element list
Should return 0 for an empty list
Should count null elements (nulls are not skipped)
Should count elements of mixed types without validating their contents
Should count nested lists as single elements (no flattening)
Should fail when no arguments are provided
Should fail when more than one argument is provided
Should fail when the argument is a number
testCases.expectsFailure: Expected argument to be list, got number

testCases.name: Should fail when the argument is a string
testCases.expectsFailure: Expected argument to be list, got string

testCases.name: Should fail when the argument is null
testCases.expectsFailure: Expected argument to be list, got null
